summary: production repair replay can reuse an old-HEAD review checkpoint and drops recorded findings

findings.detail: Filter reusable production review checkpoints by authoritative current HEAD and prove a distinct new-HEAD review dispatch after repair.
Aggregate needs_changes verdict and findings from production checkpoint entry result objects into the repair objective.

inspection.summary: Story, Architecture, Spec, test plan, production owner, run orchestration, review checkpoint shape and focused tests inspected.
inspection.evidence: focused 183 tests passed; path inspection exposed production checkpoint shape gaps

judgment_delta: core alignment passed, but production checkpoint replay and findings transport require repair
